seo.title: About Big Three Games | Independent Studio
seo.description: Learn about Big Three Games, our studio values, and how we build long-term strategic game worlds like Heritage.

hero.title: Our Studio
hero.summary: Three childhood friends founded Big Three Games to build strategic worlds with strong identity, replayable systems, and community-driven iteration.

storyCards.title: Independent by Design
storyCards.body: We are a self-driven studio. That means we can move fast, test ideas, and stay close to the players who care about our games.

storyCards.title: Systems With Character
storyCards.body: We do not separate mechanics from mood. Every system should carry personality, visual clarity, and meaningful player decisions.

storyCards.title: Community Feedback Loop
storyCards.body: We release updates, read feedback, and iterate openly. Better balance and stronger progression come from that ongoing dialogue.

storyCards.title: Built for the Long Run
storyCards.body: Our roadmap focuses on durability: systems that remain interesting, content that expands, and worlds players want to return to.

members.name: Breno
members.bio: Leads communication beats, community-facing updates, and content planning for Heritage.

members.name: Matheus
members.bio: Focused on gameplay systems, balancing, and long-term iteration for Heritage.

members.name: Guilherme
members.bio: Shapes core game direction, combat structure, and progression design for Heritage.

cta.title: Discover Heritage or Reach Out
cta.body: See how our philosophy translates into gameplay, or contact us for press and community communication.
